title: Floral Irish Savoy Cabbage Grill
description: A gentle, broiled savoy cabbage dish infused with fragrant herbs and a touch of floral essence, perfect for a comforting sickday meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Brush both sides of the cabbage wedges with olive oil and season with salt, pepper, thyme, dill, and lemon juice.
Place the seasoned wedges on the prepared baking sheet, cut side up.
Broil for 8–10 minutes, turning once, until the edges are crisp and slightly charred.
While broiling, melt butter in a small saucepan and drizzle over the cabbage wedges for extra richness.
If desired, lightly steam the wedges in vegetable broth for 2 minutes to soften them before broiling.
Transfer the grilled cabbage to a serving platter, drizzle with honey, and sprinkle with fresh dill for a floral finish.
Serve warm, optionally accompanied by a light broth or a side of mashed potatoes.
